_comment: Powers this repo's card on banjobyster.github.io. See README.md in this folder. Wrap **words** to accent them.
title: BlockForge VR
tagline: A voxel sandbox for Meta Quest 3
description: A **WebXR** voxel sandbox playable on **Quest 3** (PCVR over Link) — build block by block, and it also runs flat on desktop.
highlights: Runs in VR on Quest 3 over Link, no install
Also playable flat in the browser
Block placement, selection and world editing
